description: User data processing pipeline: parse → validate → transform → group → sort → statistics

functions.name: processUserData
functions.purpose: Main pipeline: parse JSON, validate, transform, group by domain, sort, generate stats

functions.name: filter validator
functions.purpose: Check if item has id, name, and email fields

functions.name: transform mapper
functions.purpose: Transform item: normalize name, email, extract domain, format date

functions.name: sortGroup
functions.purpose: Sort each domain group alphabetically by displayName

functions.name: stats sorter
functions.purpose: Sort domain groups by user count descending (for topDomain)

dataFlow: items → filter (valid items with id/name/email) → map (transform each item: normalize fields, extract domain)
transformed items → group by email domain → sort each group alphabetically
sorted groups → compute statistics (total, domain count, top domain, invalid count)
